name: USS Florikan (ASR 9)
events: 24 Mar 1944 During 24/25 March 1944, USS Seadragon (Cdr. R.L. Rutter, USN), conducted exercises off Pearl Harbor together with USS Mitchell (Lt.Cdr. M.S. Erdahl, USNR), USS Florikan (Cdr. G.A. Sharp, USN), USS Allen (Lt.Cdr. H.H. Nielsen, USN), USS Salmon (Cdr. H.K. Nauman, USN) and USS Bang (Cdr. A.R. Gallaher, USN). These exercises included night exercises.

25 Mar 1944 USS Seadragon (Cdr. R.L. Rutter, USN) conducted exercises off Pearl Harbor together with USS Wyman (Lt.Cdr. E.P. Parker, USNR), USS Florikan (Cdr. G.A. Sharp, USN) and USS Salmon (Cdr. H.K. Nauman, USN).

8 Apr 1944 USS Skate (T/Cdr. W.P. Gruner, Jr., USN) and USS Perch (T/Cdr. B.C. Hills, USN) conducted exercises off Pearl Harbor with USS Allen (Lt. W.J. Riley, Jr., USNR), USS Mitchell (Lt.Cdr. M.S. Erdahl, USNR) and USS Florikan (Cdr. G.A. Sharp, USN).

31 Dec 1944 USS Sargo (T/Lt.Cdr. J.M. Hingson, USN), USS Pompon (T/Cdr. S.H. Gimber, USN), USS Jallao (T/Cdr. J.B. Icenhower, USN), USS Atule (T/Cdr. J.H. Maurer, USN) and USS Spadefish (T/Cdr. G.W. Underwood, USN) conducted exercises off Majuro with USS Ramsay (Lt. R.R. Pollard, Jr., USNR) and USS Florikan (Lt. D. Hima, USN).
The exercises were broken off when USS Jallao reported seeing a periscope which was thought to be from an enemy submarine.

1 Jan 1945 During 1 and 2 January USS Pompon (T/Cdr. S.H. Gimber, USN), USS Jallao (T/Cdr. J.B. Icenhower, USN), USS Atule (T/Cdr. J.H. Maurer, USN) and USS Spadefish (T/Cdr. G.W. Underwood, USN) conducted exercises off Majuro with USS Ramsay (Lt. R.R. Pollard, Jr., USNR) and USS Florikan (Lt. D. Hima, USN). (2)

14 Feb 1945 USS Bugara (Cdr. A.F. Schade, USN) conducted exercises off Pearl Harbor together with USS Pruitt (Cdr. P.H. Bjarnason, USN), USS Florikan (Lt. D. Hima, USN) and USS Whitman (Lt. E.A. Sandor, USNR).

15 Feb 1945 During 15 and 16 February 1945, USS Icefish (T/Cdr. R.W. Peterson, USN) conducted exercises off Pearl Harbor with USS Pruitt (Cdr. P.H. Bjarnason, USN) and USS Florikan (Lt. D. Hima, USN). These exercises included night exercises.

21 Feb 1945 During 21/22 February 1945, USS Hackleback (T/Lt.Cdr. F.E. Janney, USN) and USS Queenfish (T/Cdr. C.E. Loughlin, USN) both conducted exercises off Pearl Harbor with USS Pruitt (T/Cdr. P.H. Bjarnason, USN) and USS Florikan (Lt. D. Hima, USN). These included night exercises.

3 Mar 1945 During 3/4 March 1945, USS Seahorse (T/Cdr. H.H. Greer, Jr., USN) and USS Cabrilla (T/Lt.Cdr. H.C. Lauerman, USN) conducted exercises, including night exercises, off Pearl Harbor together with USS Pruitt (Lt. D.B. Harby, USNR) and USS Florikan (Lt. D. Hima, USN).

16 Mar 1945 During 16/17 March 1945, USS Cabrilla (Lt.Cdr. H.C. Lauerman, USN), conducted exercises off Pearl Harbor together with USS Pruitt (Lt. D.B. Harby, USNR), USS Florikan (Lt. D. Hima, USN), USS PC-599 and USS Bonefish (Cdr. L.L. Edge, USN).

21 Mar 1945 USS Searaven (T/Lt.Cdr. T.M. Ustick, USN) conducted exercises off Pearl Harbor with USS Pruitt (Lt. D.B. Harby, USNR), USS Florikan (Lt. D. Hima, USN) and USS LCI(L)-880 (Lt.(jg) D.E. Norris, USNR). (3)

8 Apr 1945 USS Billfish (Lt.Cdr. L.C. Farley, USNR) conducted exercises off Pearl Harbor together with USS Staff (Lt. W.A. Upton, USNR), USS Florikan (Lt. D. Hima, USN), USS PGM-21 (Lt. L. Gardiner, USNR) and USS Torsk (Cdr. B.E. Lewellen, USN).

1 Jun 1945 USS Carp (Lt.Cdr. J.L. Hunnicutt, USNR) conducted exercises off Pearl Harbor together with USS Pruitt (Lt. D.B. Harby, USNR), USS Loeser (Lt.Cdr. J. Proctor, USNR), USS Florikan (Lt. D. Hima, USN) and USS Runner (Cdr. R.H. Bass, USN).

3 Jun 1945 USS Angler (Lt.Cdr. H. Bissell, Jr., USNR) and USS Moray (T/Cdr. F.L. Barrows, USN) conducted exercises off Pearl Harbor with USS Burden R. Hastings (Lt. J.W. Stivers, USNR), USS Loeser (Lt.Cdr. J. Proctor, USNR). In the evening USS Allen (Lt. J.A. Rowe, USN) also joined for a few hours.

They remained out for exercises during the night of 3/4 June. In the morning of the 4th, USS Loeser was detached while USS Florikan (T/Lt. D. Hima, USN) and USS Howard (Lt.Cdr. F.W. Diehl, USNR) joined. In the afternoon USS Pruitt (Lt. D.B. Harby, USNR) also joined.

5 Jun 1945 USS Barb (T/Cdr. E.B. Fluckey, USN) and USS Moray (T/Cdr. F.L. Barrows, USN) conducted exercises off Pearl Harbor with USS Darby (Lt.Cdr. M.W. Martin, USNR) and USS Florikan (T/Lt. D. Hima, USN).

4 Jul 1945 USS Balao (T/Lt.Cdr. R.K. Worthington, USN), USS Seahorse (T/Cdr. H.H. Greer, Jr., USN) carried out exercises off Pearl Harbor together with USS Darby (Lt.Cdr. M.W. Martin, USNR) and USS Florikan (Lt. D. Hima, USN).
8 Jul 1945 USS Jallao (T/Cdr. J.B. Icenhower, USN) conducted exercises off Pearl Harbor with USS Howard (Lt.Cdr. F.W. Diehl, USNR) and USS Florikan (T/Lt. D. Hima, USN).

9 Jul 1945 USS Catfish (Lt.Cdr. W.A. Overton, USNR) conducted exercises off Pearl Harbor together with USS Howard (Lt.Cdr. F.W. Diehl, USNR), USS Chew (Lt.Cdr. J.J. Mannion, USNR), USS Florikan (Lt. D. Hima, USN) and USS Stickleback (Cdr. H.K. Nauman, USN).

10 Jul 1945 USS Catfish (Lt.Cdr. W.A. Overton, USNR) conducted exercises off Pearl Harbor together with USS Howard (Lt.Cdr. F.W. Diehl, USNR), USS Chew (Lt.Cdr. J.J. Mannion, USNR), USS Florikan (Lt. D. Hima, USN) and USS Stickleback (Cdr. H.K. Nauman, USN).

14 Jul 1945 USS Catfish (Lt.Cdr. W.A. Overton, USNR) conducted exercises off Pearl Harbor together with USS J. Douglas Blackwood (Lt.Cdr. J.L. Johnston, USNR), USS Florikan (Lt. D. Hima, USN) and USS Sargo (Lt.Cdr. J.M. Hingson, USN).

31 Jul 1945 USS Bowfin (Cdr. A.K. Tyree, USN) conducted exercises off Pearl Harbor together with USS Pruitt (Lt. D.B. Harby, USNR), USS Florikan (Lt. D. Hima, USN) and USS Hoe (Lt.Cdr. M.P. Refo III, USN).
